spec_match.rationale: Provides a functional, interactive generator to compile custom values for the newly shipped `Integrity-Policy` header.

interactive.rationale: Allows checking/unchecking destinations, toggling between enforce/report modes, picking reporting options, and updating lists and code previews in real time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly matches the header's core parameters: blocked destinations, enforcement mode, and reporting endpoints.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows effect of header settings on generic script types, but does not capture dynamic import() cases or module scripts.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5178394056327168 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared CSS variables, cleanly-aligned flex rows, and high-contrast colored badges matching standard patterns.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
